creator: tcberner@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Jan Beich from comment #19)


qt5-gui fails with:

In file included from qxcbconnection.cpp:75:
/usr/local/include/X11/Xlibint.h:675:7: error: ISO C++17 does not allow 'register' storage class specifier [-Wregister]
             register _Xconst long *data,
             ^~~~~~~~~
/usr/local/include/X11/Xlibint.h:680:7: error: ISO C++17 does not allow 'register' storage class specifier [-Wregister]
             register long *data,
             ^~~~~~~~~
[...]



So maybe x11/libX11 should  be fixed ot no longer use register?
